description: You are a Laboratory Manager at a growing biotech startup. The pre-drafted commercial building shell is open in Sweet Home 3D with all existing furniture removed. Convert this empty shell into a functional 4-zone Research & Development (R&D) laboratory. Your layout must include: 1. Four distinct functional zones: 'Wet Lab', 'Gowning Room' (a small vestibule entrance), 'Equipment Room', and 'Write-up Area'. 2. Build at least 4 new partition walls to separate these areas. 3. Install at least 3 doors to allow access between the partitioned zones. 4. Define room boundaries for all 4 zones and apply a distinct floor color or texture to at least 2 of them to indicate 'clean room' status. 5. Furnish the Wet Lab with at least 6 tables/desks (acting as lab benches) and 2 sinks. 6. Furnish the Equipment Room with at least 4 shelves/cabinets and 2 refrigerators (acting as -80C lab freezers). 7. Furnish the Write-up Area with at least 3 desks, 3 office chairs, and 3 computers/laptops. 8. Draw at least 2 dimension lines between the laboratory benches in the Wet Lab to document OSHA/ADA aisle safety clearances. Source all items from Sweet Home 3D's built-in catalog. Save the file (Ctrl+S) when complete.
